summary: Pilot Flight Logbook - Single file app with comprehensive flight tracking, student/instructor management, and reporting features
architectural_notes: CSV-based data persistence for flight logs and reference data
Auto-calculation of total flight hours from takeoff/landing times
known_issues: Excel/CSV export filename does not match the proper work name or project name

existing_features.title: Create frontend form to add new Students, Instructors, Aircraft, and Exercises with separate add buttons/dialogs for each entity type

Create frontend flight log entry form with: date field auto-populated with today's date and calendar picker for manual change, dropdown selectors for Student, Instructor, Aircraft, and Exercise populated from backend, toggle for Solo/Dual flight type, toggle for Day/Night landing type, numeric input for landing count, time inputs for takeoff and landing times (HH:MM format), auto-calculated and displayed total hours, and submit button

Create frontend table/list view to display all flight log entries with columns: Date, Student, Instructor, Aircraft, Exercise, Flight Type, Landing Type, Landing Count, Takeoff Time, Landing Time, Total Hours, and action buttons for Edit and Delete on each row

Implement frontend edit functionality: clicking Edit on a flight log entry opens the entry form pre-filled with existing data, allows modification of all fields, and saves changes to backend on submit
Implement frontend delete functionality: clicking Delete on a flight log entry shows confirmation dialog, and on confirmation calls backend delete method and refreshes the table

Create frontend reporting views: Student-wise report showing each student's name and total flight hours, and Instructor-wise report showing each instructor's name, total flight hours, and number of flights
Implement frontend Export to Excel button that calls backend CSV export method and triggers browser download of the CSV file with flight log data

Investigate and identify all non-working functionality in the flight logbook application including form submissions, data loading, entity creation, flight log CRUD operations, reporting views, and CSV export
Fix any frontend React hooks errors including useEntities, useFlightLogs, useReports, and useActor hooks to ensure proper data fetching, mutation handling, and state management
Fix any UI component errors in FlightLogForm, FlightLogTable, AddEntityDialog, StudentReport, InstructorReport, and ExportButton including form validation, data binding, and event handling issues
Verify and fix Internet Identity authentication integration to ensure users can log in, maintain session state, and that authenticated operations use the correct identity principal

Add an 'Update' button to the flight log form that appears when editing an existing flight log entry, positioned at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[3]/form[1]/div[2]/button[2], which saves changes to the backend and closes the edit dialog

Ensure the date input field at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[3]/form[1]/div[1]/div[1]/input[1] maintains its current functionality during edit mode, allowing users to modify the date value using the calendar picker
Verify that the close button at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[3]/button[1] properly cancels the edit operation and closes the form dialog without saving changes

Update the ExportButton component to generate the CSV filename using 'Pilot_Flight_Logbook' as the base name instead of the current filename, formatted as 'Pilot_Flight_Logbook_YYYY-MM-DD.csv' where YYYY-MM-DD is the current date

new_feature_requests.summary: Date selection with auto-default to today and calendar picker
Student, Instructor, Aircraft, and Exercise dropdowns with add functionality
Solo/Dual toggle and Day/Night landing tracking
Landing count, takeoff/landing time tracking with auto-calculated total hours
Submit, Read, Edit, and Delete flight log entries
Student-wise and Instructor-wise reporting with total hours
Create backend data models for Student (with name field), Instructor (with name field), Aircraft (with registration/tail number field), and Exercise (with name/description field)

Create backend FlightLog data model with fields: date (Text), studentId (Text), instructorId (Text), aircraftId (Text), exerciseId (Text), flightType ("Solo" or "Dual"), landingType ("Day" or "Night"), landingCount (Nat), takeoffTime (Text in HH:MM format), landingTime (Text in HH:MM format), totalHours (Float)
Implement backend CRUD operations for Students, Instructors, Aircraft, and Exercises (create, read all, update, delete)
Implement backend CRUD operations for FlightLog entries (create, read all, update, delete) with automatic total hours calculation from takeoff and landing times

Implement backend reporting methods: getStudentTotalHours(studentId) returning total flight hours for a student, and getInstructorReport(instructorId) returning total hours and flight count for an instructor

Implement backend method to export all flight log data as CSV format, returning text content with headers: Date, Student, Instructor, Aircraft, Exercise, Flight Type, Landing Type, Landing Count, Takeoff Time, Landing Time, Total Hours
Fix any backend actor method errors including data persistence issues, query failures, or mutation errors in CRUD operations for Students, Instructors, Aircraft, Exercises, and FlightLogs
Add update button to the application
